hero_title: Your compass in a new European country
hero_sub: Legal, psychological and practical support for migrants — from documents to integration
hero_badge: Legal assistance · Poland & EU · Zero corruption
footer_about_text: Professional legal and practical assistance for migrants in Poland and the EU. Zero corruption. Strictly by the law.
faq_a_0: Yes, we store minimal data and require GDPR consent.
faq_a_1: We work strictly within the law; guarantees depend on the case.
faq_q_3: Which EU countries do you work in?
faq_a_3: Poland and other EU countries — please enquire.
faq_a_5: Discounts are possible — ask when contacting us.
how_step_0: Tell us your situation via WhatsApp or the form. We listen, assess and reply honestly — before any payment.
how_step_1: Together we find the best path. A clear action plan with options A and B — before we even start.
how_step_2: Payment confirms the start. Everything in writing, step by step, under your control. No surprises.
how_step_3: Your assistant is with you at every step. If something goes wrong — we analyse and move forward. We don't disappear.
how_step_4: Document or decision received. Case closed. You are safe — and you know what to do next.
svc_desc_0: Immediate suspension of proceedings. Appeals. Status protection.
svc_desc_1: First card, renewal, EU resident, citizenship.
svc_desc_2: Psychological support during adaptation and stress.
svc_desc_4: Child rights. School enrollment. Anti-discrimination protection.
svc_desc_5: Help with health insurance and social benefits.
svc_desc_6: Tenant rights. Resolving disputes with landlords.
svc_desc_7: Unpaid wages. Labour rights. Working conditions.
svc_desc_9: Legal support for relocation and legalization in Spain.
pricing_free_desc: Initial assessment of your situation. We'll tell you if we can help.
pricing_consult_desc: Full analysis. When ordering a service — deducted from the total.
pricing_hour_desc: Lawyer or specialist. Without VAT — cheaper than law firms.
exit_title: Wait! We have a gift for you
exit_desc: Leave your email and get a free consultation with our migration expert (worth 150 PLN).
exit_done_desc: Also check WhatsApp — we often respond faster:
videos_home_title: See the future of Kompas Migracji
videos_home_desc: Official films about the Migrants Union in Europe, Kompas AI and KompasCRM — with voiceover, orchestra and 4K effects.
videos_page_desc: Two official films about the Migrants Union in Europe and KompasCRM. Founder — Oleksandr Vasylyshyn. Architect — Oleksandr Khrystodul, iPhoenix®. Our AI — Kompas AI.
videos_project_title: Kompas Migracji — Migrants Union in Europe
videos_project_sub: WOW premiere · Kompas AI · Founder Oleksandr Vasylyshyn

pricing_hero_sub: The legal hour is the basic unit of interaction with a specialist. It covers consultations, situation analysis, document preparation, strategy formation and preparation for submission or interview.
pricing_modal_desc: The price is determined individually. Choose a convenient contact method — our specialist will respond within 2 hours:
pricing_lbl_agree: I accept the Terms and the processing of personal data
pricing_err_firstname: Enter first name in Latin characters (e.g. Ivan)
pricing_err_lastname: Enter last name in Latin characters (e.g. Petrenko)
pricing_step1_desc: Find the service in the table and click «Buy».
pricing_step2_desc: Fill in first name, last name, phone and email for receipt — in Latin characters.
pricing_step3_desc: Secure payment via Przelewy24 — card, BLIK, transfer. SSL 256-bit.
pricing_step4_desc: You receive an email receipt and a specialist contacts you within 2 hours.
pricing_important: Prices marked «Individual» are calculated by our partner firm case by case depending on circumstances. We do not sell consulate queue slots or invitations.
pricing_safe_desc: Przelewy24 — licensed payment operator in Poland · Card data not stored on our servers · SSL 256-bit encryption
sq_desc: Choose your situation — we'll show exactly what you need
sq_5_label: I don't know where to start
sq_result_sub: Write to us now — we respond within 2 hours.
pricing_promo_desc: Legal hour with 33% discount — 300 zł instead of 450 zł
pricing_sub_desc: Unlimited support from 49 zł/month — choose a plan and pay online
pay_ssl: SSL 256-bit encryption · Przelewy24 sp. z o.o. · KNF licence

ai_greeting:
Hi! 👋 I am your personal AI assistant from Kompas Migracji.

To help you as quickly as possible and pass the case to our lawyer, please describe your situation. What questions regarding legalization or documents are you interested in?

ai_f2_desc: Saves time on basic questions. The lawyer receives a ready summary.
